Buyer Pre-Offer Stage: Check your finances and get a mortgage agreement in principle (AIP)
Once Address is Known, Even before Appointment, do the below
Research the area, distance from schools, flood chance, crime rates
Do subsidence checks, coal mine area, radon exposure checks, these are free to check online
Above line may look simple, but stuff like coal mine and subsidene chceks in paid reports make or break a decision, why wait for solicitors to ask for it and pay for it
Download Energy Performance Certificate (EPC) online for free for the property, It shows AgeBand, when the property was built, and its area, energy rating
Viewing Checks with Agent: Agents say we dont know to any of this, Solicitor will get this info, Just ask them you dont want to see the certificates, but absence of this means illegal constructions and council can fine you 50£ per day and ask you to demolish the extension, so you want to be sure about this before you make an offer !!!
Check if House has New WC Room Added, Ensuite, Kitchen, Bathroom extensions
Check for garage conversions/demolitions/conservatory extensions, some of these may not need planning permissions but may need building regulations
If yes, Check if seller has Planning Permissions and Building Completion Certificates for above
If No plans exist, Check for Reqularization certificate if work done without Planning Permission/Building Regulations
Check for FENSA certificates for glass doors/windows
If No plans exist, Check for Reqularization certificate if work done without Planning Permission/Building Regulations
If yes, check for boiler Gas Safety installation certificate
Check for rewiring/ electrical work done
If yes, check for rewiring EIC/EICR certificates

If Agents say no, Follow this up once Soicitor is instructed, mark it for follow up with solicitor, Mininum cost is 100 to 300£ for Solicitor instruction, ID checks, AML checks, and asking for these certificates, so you want to be sure about this before you make an offer !!!
Offer Acceptance Stage with Agent: Agree on What is included in the sale (fixtures/fittings), This will need to be included in TA10 Form in future steps
Agree on deposit amount and date
1 -3 days, Client Care Pack Sent from Agent to Buyer (Signed)
Estate agent confirmation of agreed sale price
Buyer Solicitor Instructed Stage: Most of these documents are received on day of instruction or within 3 days, They dont send to Buyer, we have to ask them to send over
Title Plan Contains a B/W map of the property and its boundaries
Title Register Contains details of the property ownership and any restrictions or covenants
Letter of Instruction (from Buyer Solicitor to Seller's Solicitor), Check your names spelling and address details are correct

TA6 Property Information Form, Very important form, contains details about the property, its boundaries, rights of way, disputes, services, and other important information. Review this form carefully and raise any questions or concerns with the seller's solicitor.

TA6 Section 5.1 a) is for Windows Door Additions, b) for extensions, i) for any other alterations (eg Added Ensuite or WC ) , if any of these are yes,  and check if they have planning permissions and building regulations certificates, if not ask for regularization certificate
TA10 Fittings and Contents Form, this form should match what you agreed with agent
Buyer PreChecks through Solicitor: If Extensions or alterations are present, request planning permissions and regulation certificates
Ask for FENSA certificates for New or replaced glass doors/windows
Ask for boiler Gas Safety installation certificate
Survey & Reports: Raise repairs/search queries with seller solicitor
Order Paid Searches Now: Local Authority Searches, Mandatory search that checks for planning permissions, building regulations, enforcement actions, and other local authority information related to the property
Environmental Searches (ground stability, flood risk, contaminated land), Mandatory- if Mortgaged
Water and Drainage Search (checks if property is connected to mains water and sewerage, and if there are any public drains on the property) Mandatory- if Mortgaged
Buyer Solicitor Tasks: Analyses above paid search reports and creates a Report on Title (Read & Signed)
Mortgage offer received in Portal and checked
Exchange & Completion: Buildings Insurance active from exchange date
